title: Shop integration
detail: Integrate Printful API for canvas prints and clothing. Stripe for payments. Product descriptions written in Matthew's voice.

title: Settings page
detail: Currently a placeholder. Build out actual settings — theme preferences, notification opt-ins, or reader preferences.

title: Photography gallery
detail: A dedicated gallery page showcasing Matthew's photography. Minimal layout, full-bleed images, no clutter.

title: User Settings Page with Switchable Theme
detail: Build out the settings page with a switchable light/dark theme preference, persisted to localStorage.

title: Menu update
detail: As part of the menu update i want to a link to a settlings page. We need to bring hte text more to the left hand side to. At the moment it is a bit too centered. We should loose the go home link and put two small icons near the bottom of the menu window. on the left i want our Wolfman logo. One hte right i want the claude code icon. The wolfman logo will link to the hom page, claude code icon will link to the development page.
